description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and beige surfaces, with vertical wooden slats accenting one side and large glass windows providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent balcony and a set of wide steps leading up to the main entrance, which is partially recessed for privacy. On one side, there is a small pool or water feature adjacent to a patio area, while the rear of the house has expansive glass doors opening to a terrace. The landscaping is simple, with green patches and a gently sloped base, suggesting integration with a suburban or urban lot. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist white and beige exterior accented by vertical wooden slats and a small pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, balcony, and a mix of white and beige surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, vertical wooden slats, and a small pool or water feature near the patio.
description_view_2: Rear view with large glass doors, terrace, and a simple, clean facade with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the vertical wooden slats, side windows, and the integration of the house with the sloped terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with wide steps, minimal overhang, and a balcony above
